fairs.name: Spring Engineering Career Fair
fairs.description: Connect with top engineering employers. Over 200 companies attending. Bring resumes and dress professionally.

fairs.name: Business, Industry & Technology Career Fair
fairs.description: Career fair for all majors with emphasis on business, technology, and liberal arts careers.

fairs.name: People to People Career Fair
fairs.description: Focused on human services, education, government, and non-profit careers.

fairs.name: Study Abroad Fair
fairs.description: Explore 100+ study abroad programs. Talk to advisors and returning students.

fairs.name: Graduate School Fair
fairs.description: Meet representatives from grad programs across the country. Workshops on applications and funding.

fairs.name: Design Expo
fairs.description: Senior design students showcase capstone projects. Networking with industry sponsors.
